authors: Exeterd Oxford Internet Institute (OII) & Reuters Institute (RISJ)
Oxfordshiref Department of English Language and Literature
raw_title: How Does GenAI “See” Climate Change: Exploring the Challenges and Opportunities of GenAI for Climate Visual Journalism
title_en: How Does GenAI “See” Climate Change: Exploring the Challenges and Opportunities of GenAI for Climate Visual Journalism
title_zh: 生成式人工智能如何“看待”气候变化：探索生成式人工智能在气候视觉新闻中的挑战与机遇
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了生成式人工智能（GenAI）如何理解和呈现气候变化相关的视觉内容，分析了它在气候视觉新闻领域带来的新机遇和潜在挑战。
plain_summary_en: This research explores how generative AI (GenAI) understands and presents visual content related to climate change, analyzing the new opportunities and potential challenges it brings to climate visual journalism.
research_direction_zh: 研究生成式人工智能在新闻媒体中的应用，特别是如何利用AI技术改进气候变化的视觉传播效果和公众认知。
research_direction_en: Investigating the application of generative AI in news media, particularly how AI technology can enhance the visual communication of climate change and public understanding.
